title: 31C CRM Contact Frontmatter
description: Back-compat shim. Accepts either the legacy contact shape OR the new relationship-record shape (see crm-relationship.schema.json). New writes should target one of the two child schemas explicitly. This file remains for tools that haven't switched yet.

name.description: Full display name (canonical English form per reference_bilingual_names memory)

company.description: Current employer / affiliation. Required for prospect/customer/partner types.

title.description: Job title at the time of last_touch

type.description: Relationship classification. Drives cadence rules and CRM radar tiering. Recommended canonical values: tribe, prospect, customer, partner, investor, advisor, reseller, ecosystem, press, regulator, service-provider, personal, other. Compound values (e.g. investor-active, tribe-leadership, prospect-partner) are tolerated for legacy data but should converge on the canonical set over time.

region.description: Geographic region; free-form but prefer 'GCC (UAE)', 'EU (Germany)', etc.

email.description: Primary contact email. Leave blank rather than guessing. Empty string allowed.

phone.description: E.164-like format preferred. Empty string allowed when unknown.

cadence.description: Days between intentional touches. 0 = no cadence tracking (tribe members per feedback_crm_cadence_exceptions). 7/14/30/60/90 are common. Empty string accepted as legacy 'no cadence set' marker.

last_touch.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD of most recent meaningful interaction

created.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when this contact file was first created

source.description: How the contact entered the network (event, introduction by, cold reach, etc.)

owner.description: Which executive owns this relationship. Defaults to CEO when missing. Used by aggregate-crm.py for multi-owner overlap detection.

status.description: Pipeline-adjacent relationship status. Distinct from pipeline.md deal stage.

entity_ref.description: Slug of the address book entity. MUST match an existing crm/address-book/{slug}.md file. Dangling refs surface as 'needs entity link' in the radar.

relationship_type.description: This executive's relationship classification. Drives cadence rules. Canonical: tribe, tribe-leadership, prospect, customer, partner, partner-active, investor-active, investor-passive, shareholder, reseller, government, media, advisor, ecosystem, vendor, inactive.

pipeline_company.description: OPTIONAL. Free-text company name used for pipeline.md cross-reference. Falls back to address_book.employer when absent. Aliases handled by crm/aliases.md.

radar_freeze_until.description: OPTIONAL. ISO date or empty string. /crm next skips this contact until the date passes. Must be edited by CEO to unfreeze.

relevant_principles.description: OPTIONAL, CEO-workspace only. Odin principle slugs (filenames in knowledge/odin-brain/principles/) relevant to this relationship, derived from relationship_type + pipeline stage by scripts/odin-principles.py. Read by /meeting-prep and /deal-strategy for inline citation. Absent on exec workspaces (no Odin brain).
